errors.rate_limited: Slow down — try again in a moment.
errors.user_not_found: This email isn't registered. Ask an admin for an invitation.
errors.invite_expired: Your invitation has expired. Ask the organizer to send a new one.
errors.disposable_email: Disposable emails don't work here. Use a regular address and you're good to go.
errors.code_invalid: Wrong code. Check your email and try again.
errors.code_expired: That code has expired. Request a new one.
errors.link_expired: That link has expired. Request a new code.
errors.unknown: Something went wrong. Please try again.
